title: Support - App, user not logged ever, dialog
scenario: Guest user installing mobile app, completing onboarding, and tapping Support > App button sees a login prompt dialog with "Later" and "Login" options.
steps: Go through onboarding as a Guest
Navigate to Support via the hamburger menu
expected: A dialog should appear prompting the user to log in with their Poly Lens account. The dialog displays the message: "Log in with your Poly Lens account to access useful information that can improve your support experience." with "Later" and "Login" buttons.
